_comment: Mimecast integration configuration for AD Security Assessment.
_credentials: Do NOT store credentials here. Set environment variables instead:
_env_vars: MIMECAST_ACCESS_KEY  — Access Key from API 2.0 application
MIMECAST_SECRET_KEY  — Secret Key (Base64-encoded) from API 2.0 application
_daysBack_comment: Number of days of history to collect per run. Increase to 7 for initial baseline pull.
_collectTTPUrl_comment: Collect TTP URL Protect click logs (T1566.002). Requires URL Protect enabled.
_collectDLP_comment: Collect DLP policy violation logs (T1048). Requires DLP policies configured.
_collectSIEM_comment: Collect SIEM event stream (T1110.003, T1114). Requires Enhanced Logging enabled in Mimecast account settings.
_collectImpersonation_comment: Collect Impersonation Protect logs (T1566.001, T1656). Requires Impersonation Protect enabled.
_siemTokenFile_comment: Filename (relative to OutputFolder) to persist the SIEM continuation token between runs for incremental collection.
_scanResultFilter_options: all, malicious, suspicious, clean — use 'all' to capture everything and let analyzer filter
_pageSize_comment: Records per paginated API page (max 500). Reduce to 100 if experiencing timeouts.
_apiTimeoutSeconds_comment: HTTP request timeout in seconds. SIEM batch endpoint may be slow on large tenants.
